title: cola selengana
intro: Cola selengana, also known as the bitters or bengue, is a plant species native to tropical Africa that belongs to the family Sterculiaceae. The plant's roots and seeds have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cola selengana include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for headaches and muscle pain. In herbal preparations, the roots and seeds of Cola selengana are often made into a decoction or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
